zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Balderston於1270年出生在英國藍卡爾布萊克本時，他的父親William de Balderston31歲，母親Mrs. William De Balderston28歲。他和Alice Keverdale至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1332年在他的家鄉享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Balderston于1270年出生在英国藍卡爾布萊克本时，他的父亲William de Balderston31岁，母亲Mrs. William De Balderston28岁。他和Alice Keverdale至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1332年在他的家乡享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Balderston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from either of two places in Lancashire called Balderston(e), deriving their names from the genitive case of the Old English personal name Baldhere (composed of the elements bald ‘bold, brave’ + here ‘army’) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
Scottish: habitational name from Balderston in West Lothian, which has the same etymology as 1 above.

variants.name: Balderson
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and Northamptonshire): assimilated form of Balderston , rather than a patronymic from Balder, appearances to the contrary notwithstanding.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Balderston was born in 1270, in Blackburn, Lancashire, England, his father, William de Balderston, was 31 and his mother, Mrs. William De Balderston, was 28. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Alice Keverdale. He died in 1332, in his hometown, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Balderston est né en 1270, à Blackburn, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William de Balderston, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William De Balderston, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Alice Keverdale. Il est décédé en 1332, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Balderston 1270 in Blackburn, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Balderston 31 und seine Mutter Mrs. William De Balderston 28. Er hatte mit Alice Keverdale mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1332 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Balderston è nato il nel 1270 nel Blackburn, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William de Balderston, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. William De Balderston, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Alice Keverdale. Morì nel 1332, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Balderstonが1270年にイギリスランカシュアイアブラクブルンで生まれた時，父William de Balderstonは31歳，母Mrs. William De Balderstonは28歳であった。彼はAlice Keverdaleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1332年に故郷で62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Balderston(이)가 1270년 영국 랭카실르 블랙번에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Balderston(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. William De Balderston(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Alice Keverdale(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Balderston nasceu em 1270, em Blackburn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Balderston, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William De Balderston, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Alice Keverdale. Ele faleceu em 1332, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Balderston родился в 1270 г. в местности блэккбурн, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Balderston было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William De Balderston, 28. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Alice Keverdale. Он умер в 1332 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Balderston nació en 1270, en Blackburn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Balderston, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mrs. William De Balderston, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Alice Keverdale. Murió en 1332, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años.
